_meta.backend: Brian's running Zeus.Server :6060 (HL2 connected, live RX 192 kHz LSB on 40 m)
_meta.frontend: Vite dev :5183 from worktree, perf_pass_3 branch HEAD c3091e1
_meta.client: playwright MCP Chrome 147.0.7727.138, 1600x1000 viewport, second tab on backend (Brian's tab is the first)
_meta.notes: Probe overhead: setInterval lag-sampler @ 25 Hz, heap sampler @ 4 Hz, rAF tick, copyToChannel wrap — small but not zero. CPU sampler ran in parallel via `top -l 7 -s 5`.

heap._note: Grew 5.6 MB over 30 s. Max-vs-end gap of ~22 MB indicates one GC fired mid-window.

cpu_top_pct_one_core._note: macOS `top -l 7 -s 5`. Per-core scaled, so 100 % = one core saturated.
